# fullSizeImageOrientation

**Instance Property**

The Exif display orientation of the full-size image file.

## Declaration

```swift
var fullSizeImageOrientation: Int32 { get }
```

## Discussion

This property’s value is a raw numeric value describing the encoded image orientation according to the TIFF and Exif specifications. To more easily work with such values, convert this value to the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ImageIO/CGImagePropertyOrientation] type.

## Related Documentation

- **CGImagePropertyOrientation**: A value describing the intended display orientation for an image.

## Working with Photo Assets

- **displaySizeImage**: An image of the asset’s contents, appropriately sized for display.
- **fullSizeImageURL**: The URL to a file that contains the full-sized image data.
